name: Prepare For A Client Meeting

presentations."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "During the meeting:"}], "data-id": "during-the-meeting"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ask other business-related questions than eCommerce."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This allows you to consider longer term strategies. In many instances, businesses can't scale due to process inefficiencies, so consider strategies for helping the customer solve these issues."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Orders", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How many total orders do you receive a day? Which sales channels do you receive these orders from?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If In-store - Do you  use a cash register, spreadsheet or a POS system?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If online - Are invoices automatically sent to the customer upon on order submission?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Marketplaces - are these processed via the marketplace, or linked to another system - i.e their eComm or POS system?"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Process orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " - i.e from the point of receiving an order how is sent via the print out pick slips."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "What are the steps once an order is received?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "What systems are manually updated - Do you update your accounting platform and other systems that hold stock levels manually?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How do you pack the order? For example, Does one person fulfil all orders or do you use bins and locations within the warehouse?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Do you manually print pick slips or use an automated system?"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Do you use couriers, manually post the items via the post office, or use your own courier drivers?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How do you do pricing up for a courier on orders?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "What courier(s) are you planning to use?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How do you print labels?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Do you submit a manifest to couriers?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How do you send tracking information back to the customers who have ordered?"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Manage stock", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How do you manage stock?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Where is your supplier data held?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Do you receive automatic stock reports when items are low?"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Hosting / IT infrastructure", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Do you have your own hosting infrastructure or is it 'in the cloud'?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Are you using any cloud-based solutions or are they all server based?"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ask questions like:"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "After the meeting:"}], "data-id": "after-the-meeting"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "What actions require follow up?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Do you need to contact Maropost Commerce for further information?"}]}]}]}]
